name: english-words-with-hindi
title: English Words with Hindi
description: A personal AI-powered vocabulary companion inside Raycast that saves words to a local database.
author: harshdeepsinghin

commands.name: know-about-words
commands.title: Vocabulary Companion
commands.subtitle: English Words with Hindi
commands.description: Look up English words with Gemini AI and save them to your local database

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Enter your Gemini API key (e.g. from Google AI Studio)

preferences.name: geminiModel
preferences.title: Gemini Model
preferences.description: Select the Gemini model to use for definitions

preferences.name: wordsDirectory
preferences.title: Words Storage Directory
preferences.description: Local directory path to save vocabulary markdown files

scripts.build: ray build && mkdir -p assets && cp .assets/extension-icon.png assets/extension-icon.png
scripts.dev: mkdir -p assets && cp .assets/extension-icon.png assets/extension-icon.png && ray develop
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
